name: Blueberry Buttermilk Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together in a large bowl.
2. Whisk the eggs, buttermilk, and melted butter in another bowl.
3. Make a well in the dry ingredients and pour in the liquid ingredients, mixing quickly.
4. Fold in the blueberries.
5. Spoon the batter into greased muffin cups.
6. Bake at 400°F for 20-30 minutes until golden brown. Makes 24 muffins.
